verses.text: The elder to 'the elect lady and her children,' loved in the truth; grace, mercy, and peace from the Father and Son. Greeting in truth. Love and truth go together.
The elder to 'the elect lady and her children,' loved in the truth; grace, mercy, and peace from the Father and Son. Greeting in truth. Love and truth go together.
The elder to 'the elect lady and her children,' loved in the truth; grace, mercy, and peace from the Father and Son. Greeting in truth. Love and truth go together.
I rejoiced to find thy children 'walking in truth'; the old commandment is this, 'that we love one another.' Truth and love. Walking in truth means loving one another.
I rejoiced to find thy children 'walking in truth'; the old commandment is this, 'that we love one another.' Truth and love. Walking in truth means loving one another.
I rejoiced to find thy children 'walking in truth'; the old commandment is this, 'that we love one another.' Truth and love. Walking in truth means loving one another.
Many deceivers, denying Christ 'come in the flesh,' are gone out; 'look to yourselves,' that you lose not your reward. Watch. Guard against deceivers and keep your full reward.
Many deceivers, denying Christ 'come in the flesh,' are gone out; 'look to yourselves,' that you lose not your reward. Watch. Guard against deceivers and keep your full reward.
Whoever abides not in Christ's doctrine 'hath not God'; receive not such into your house nor bid him God speed. No welcome to error. Do not aid those who deny Christ.
Whoever abides not in Christ's doctrine 'hath not God'; receive not such into your house nor bid him God speed. No welcome to error. Do not aid those who deny Christ.
Whoever abides not in Christ's doctrine 'hath not God'; receive not such into your house nor bid him God speed. No welcome to error. Do not aid those who deny Christ.
Having many things to write, he hopes to come and speak 'face to face, that our joy may be full.' Farewell. He longs for fellowship in person.
